issues.description: Condition should check if Leader has {Animal Kingdom Pirates} type, not if a card is on board. Should be LeaderHasType:Animal Kingdom Pirates
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn' — text states 'during this turn' which means the effect lasts only for the current turn phase
Rest action should include cost condition in target specification; currently missing explicit cost constraint in action definition
Missing first effect: 'If this Character would be K.O.'d, you may return 1 DON!! card from your field to your DON!! deck instead.' This is a Counter trigger that should prevent K.O.
